question: What are your delivery timelines?
answer: Standard delivery takes 5–7 business days. You’ll receive updates and a tracking ID once your order ships.

question: Do you charge for delivery?
answer: Delivery is free on all orders. No extra shipping charges at checkout.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Go to My Profile → My Orders → View Details for tracking and status updates.

question: How long do refunds take?
answer: After approval, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to the original payment method.

question: Can I cancel my order?
answer: You can cancel before dispatch from My Orders. If shipped, refuse delivery or start a return after delivery.

question: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
answer: If your order hasn’t shipped, contact support via order details to update the address.

question: Do you offer assembly services?
answer: Yes. Many items include self-assembly guides; professional assembly may be available—ask support.

question: Is there a warranty on products?
answer: Most products include a standard manufacturer warranty (varies by product). See product page.

question: Are product dimensions accurate?
answer: Yes. Dimensions are listed on each product page under “Product Dimensions.”

question: Do you offer customization?
answer: Some products support customization (fabric/finish/size). Check the product page or contact support.

question: I received a damaged or wrong item. What should I do?
answer: Report via My Orders → Contact Support with photos within 48 hours; we’ll arrange replacement/refund.

question: How do coupons work?
answer: Enter your coupon at checkout. Some coupons require a minimum order value or have usage limits.

question: Why was my coupon rejected?
answer: It may be expired, account-restricted, or below minimum order value. Check coupon terms.

question: An item is out of stock—can I get notified?
answer: Yes. Click “Notify me when back in stock” on the product page to receive an alert.

question: How do I download my invoice?
answer: Go to My Orders → View Details → Download Invoice to get a printable invoice.

question: What are your support hours?
answer: Support is available 9:00 AM–6:00 PM (IST), Mon–Sat. You can also message via chat anytime.

question: Is my data secure?
answer: We use industry-standard security for payments and data protection. See our Privacy Policy.
